evidence.description: Evidence, inference, or missing basis for the result.
evidence.title: Evidence

missing_basis.description: Required evidence or authority when the check is blocked.
missing_basis.title: Missing Basis

name.description: Name of the check being evaluated.
name.title: Name

findings.description: Evidence-grounded findings for this report section.
findings.title: Findings

missing_basis.description: Specific missing evidence or authority that blocks the section.
missing_basis.title: Missing Basis

status.description: Whether this section is grounded or blocked by missing authority.
status.title: Status

claims_supported.description: Report claims or sections supported by the source when used.
claims_supported.title: Claims Supported

reason.description: Why the source was unused when used is false.
reason.title: Reason

used.description: Whether the report used this source.
used.title: Used

current_posture.description: Concrete current repo posture derived from supplied context.
current_posture.title: Current Posture

dominant_tension_justification.description: Why the selected tension governs the current trajectory.
dominant_tension_justification.title: Dominant Tension Justification

next_admissible_transition.description: One bounded transformation inside current authority.
next_admissible_transition.title: Next Admissible Transition

proof_frontier.description: Next evidence-producing boundary that would reduce uncertainty.
proof_frontier.title: Proof Frontier

structural_tension.description: Dominant evidence, authority, constraint, or verification gap.
structural_tension.title: Structural Tension

summary.description: Short terminal-safe summary of the report.
summary.title: Summary

thesis_attractor.description: Project direction derived from project spec authority.
thesis_attractor.title: Thesis Attractor
